All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

G

getAlbum(String) - Method in class model.User
Retrieves an album with the given name
getAlbums() - Method in class model.User
Returns list of albums belonging to this user.
getAllUsers() - Static method in class model.UserStorage
Returns a map of all users.
getCaption() - Method in class model.Photo
Returns the caption associated with the photo.
getCurrentAlbumName() - Static method in class model.Session
Returns the name of the currently opened album.
getCurrentPhoto() - Static method in class model.Session
Returns the currently selected photo.
getDate() - Method in class model.Photo
Returns the date and time the photo was taken.
getEarliestDate() - Method in class model.Album
Returns the earliest photo date within this album Returns null if no photos or photos do not have dates
getFilePath() - Method in class model.Photo
Returns the file path of the photo.
getKnownTagTypes() - Method in class model.User
Returns a list of all tag types known to this user
getLatestDate() - Method in class model.Album
Returns the latest photo date within this album Returns null if no photos or photos do not have dates
getName() - Method in class model.Album
Returns the name of this album
getName() - Method in class model.Tag
Returns the tag's name.
getOrCreateUser(String) - Static method in class model.UserStorage
Retrieves the user with the given username.
getPhotoCount() - Method in class model.Album
Returns the number of photos in this album
getPhotos() - Method in class model.Album
Returns the list of photos in this album
getStage() - Static method in class app.Photos
Returns the main stage for the app.
getTags() - Method in class model.Photo
Returns the list of tags associated with the photo.
getUser(String) - Static method in class model.UserStorage
Returns the user with the given username, or null if no such user exists.
getUsername() - Static method in class model.Session
Returns the username of the currently logged in user.
getUsername() - Method in class model.User
Returns the username for this user.
getValue() - Method in class model.Tag
Returns the tag's value.
go(String) - Static method in class app.Photos
Switches stages to display the specified FXML file.
